verdict: A rhythmic and energetic chart that fits the song's quirky synth-pop vibes well, though it suffers from some monotony in the verses and an awkward hold-tap combination.

issues.problem: Highly repetitive 4th-note loop (D-U-L-D-U-R) that persists for 17 seconds, ignoring vocal nuances and making the verse feel monotonous.
While holding D, the player must tap L at 88.783 and R at 88.893. This forces a very fast 16th-note double-step/slide on the free foot, which is highly awkward and flow-breaking.
